strategy.name: V5: Heavy Insiders + Simplified Trend
strategy.warning: The original backtest numbers were contaminated by an SEC Form 4 filter bug that counted stock grants (code A) as insider purchases. After filtering to code P only, V5 produced just 7 trades across 75 stocks over 2.5 years — not a meaningful sample. Expanded backtest on 518 stocks / 5+ years is pending. Do not move to real-money trading until a strategy achieves Z > 1.5 on 100+ trades.
strategy.description: 5+ open-market insider purchases in 90 days plus EMA10>EMA21 + price>SMA200 + RSI 35-70. Exit: 1.5x ATR stop, 5-day loser cut, RSI>70 take-profit, EMA crossdown, 30-day time stop.

stale_backtest_results.note: These numbers are from the buggy signal and are NOT valid. Kept here for reference while revalidation runs.

indicators.ema_10: Short-term trend. When EMA10 > EMA21, short-term momentum is bullish.
indicators.ema_21: Medium-term trend. EMA10 crossing above EMA21 confirms upward momentum.
indicators.sma_200: Long-term trend filter. Price above SMA200 = stock is in a macro uptrend.
indicators.rsi_14: Momentum gauge. Between 35-70 = not overbought. Wider range than typical to avoid filtering good setups.
indicators.atr_14: Volatility — used for stop loss placement at 1.5x ATR below entry.
indicators.insider_buying: SEC Form 4 filings. 5+ insider purchases in 90 days = heavy accumulation by people who know the company best.

long: EMA(10) > EMA(21) — short-term trend is up
Price above SMA(200) — long-term uptrend intact
RSI(14) between 35 and 70 — momentum present, not overbought
5+ insider purchases in last 90 days with net buying (SEC Form 4)

exit_rules: Cut losers at 5 days: if trade is negative after 5 trading days, exit immediately
Stop loss: 1.5x ATR below entry price (hard floor, evaluated at bar close)
Take profit: when RSI crosses above 70
Trend break: exit if EMA(10) crosses below EMA(21)
Time stop: exit after 30 trading days max
risk_rules: Risk maximum 1% of portfolio per trade on the ATR-based stop distance
Paper trade only until a strategy clears the pre-committed backtest criteria

insider_config.description: Threshold for the V5 entry rule. Whether insider buying has a real edge on this universe is currently unvalidated — see the top-level warning.
